spec_review_notes: Freeze the replay scope to append-only run artifacts under .planning/evolution/runs/<run_id>/, no live repo/task mutation, no provider execution, and stage-aware failure persistence.

normal_cases.name: A read-only evolution run completes the full helper sequence and persists the expected stage artifacts.

edge_cases.name: Constraints or fitness that lack metrics remain explicit pending results while the run still persists inspectable artifacts.

exception_cases.name: A stage failure persists stage-aware failure metadata and does not mutate live repo or task state.
